date_notes: One of four s.33 invocations within a two-month span. Exact date to confirm.
title_en: Notwithstanding clause invoked in legislation affecting transgender youth
title_fr: La clause dérogatoire est invoquée dans une loi concernant les jeunes transgenres
description_en: The government invokes section 33 of the Charter in legislation concerning policies affecting transgender youth — reported as the fourth such invocation within an approximately two-month period.
inference_note: The count (fourth s.33 invocation in roughly two months) is supported by R-013. The further characterization that this pace is 'without precedent in Canadian provincial history' is attributed to critics (e.g. Ganley, Egale) in the source, not asserted as fact by the outlet — carry it as attributed inference, not fact.

relations.note: Carry-forward from related_events — confirm relation type

verification_notes: s.33 invocation and 'fourth in ~two months' count verified against R-013 (CBC). 'Without precedent in provincial history' moved to inference_note as critics' characterization, not fact. Exact date still month-precision — confirm if day precision needed.
